# x402-MEM-P1 Substrate
> Status: FROZEN_SPEC / Zero-Entropy
> Access: Machine-to-Machine (x402)
> Manifest: /.well-known/x402/substrate.json
> SDK (Python): https://github.com/antsramz/x402-client-python

## Economic Invariants
This substrate and its fee structure are non-mutating (IMMUTABLE):
- P1_IDENTITY: $0.005 USDC
- P2_SCHEMA: $0.001 USDC
- P3_DECISION: $0.02 USDC

## Protocol Note
Fees are settled via Pillar 1 Gate. Agents should utilize the provided SDK for deterministic HMAC-SHA256 signing and automated routing.
